2604.19309.title: Co-Refine: AI-Powered Tool Supporting Qualitative Analysis
2604.19309.paper_summary: Qualitative coding relies on a researcher's application of codes to textual data. As coding proceeds across large datasets, interpretations of codes often shift (temporal drift), reducing the credibility of the analysis. Existing Computer-Assisted Qualitative Data Analysis (CAQDAS) tools provide support for data management but offer no workflow for real-time detection of these drifts. We present Co-Refine, an AI-augmented qualitative coding platform that delivers continuous, grounded feedback on coding consistency without disrupting the researcher's workflow. The system employs a three-stage audit pipeline: Stage 1 computes deterministic embedding-based metrics for mathematical consistency; Stage 2 grounds LLM verdicts within $\pm0.15$ of the deterministic scores; and Stage 3 produces code definitions from previous patterns to create a deepening feedback loop. Co-Refine demonstrates that deterministic scoring can effectively constrain LLM outputs to produce reliable, real-time audit signals for qualitative analysis.
2604.19309.paper_summary_zh: 質性編碼依賴研究人員對文本數據應用編碼。隨著在大型數據集上進行編碼，對編碼的解釋往往會發生變化（時間漂移），這降低了分析的可信度。現有的計算機輔助質性數據分析（CAQDAS）工具提供數據管理的支持，但沒有提供實時檢測這些漂移的工作流程。我們介紹了Co-Refine，一個增強AI的質性編碼平台，能夠在不干擾研究人員工作流程的情況下，提供持續、基於實證的編碼一致性反饋。該系統採用三階段審計管道：第一階段計算基於確定性嵌入的數學一致性指標；第二階段將LLM判決的結果限制在確定性分數的$\pm0.15$範圍內；第三階段從先前的模式中生成代碼定義，以創建一個加深的反饋循環。Co-Refine展示了確定性評分如何有效地限制LLM輸出，以產生可靠的實時審計信號，用於質性分析。
2604.19309.author: Athikash Jeyaganthan et.al.
2604.19309.authors: Athikash Jeyaganthan, Kai Xu, Franziska Becker, Steffen Koch
